description: Measures the site's capability to effectively manage and infiltrate stormwater, reducing runoff and improving water quality.
Evalutes the amount of shade and reduced heat island effect to support human wellness outdoors.
Reflects the degree of specialized maintenance, labor, and lifetime effort required to uphold the design.
Assesses the diversity of plant life, structural complexity of habitats, and overall support for local ecology.
Examines the upfront capital offset against long-term operation, replacement, and material lifespan savings.
